question_text: Use the graph below showing the pair of linear equations. What does the geometric relationship between the lines indicate about the system?

options.A: The system has a unique solution
options.C: The system has infinitely many solutions
options.D: Cannot be determined from the graph

answer_key.explanation: The two lines meet at a single point, so the pair of linear equations has exactly one common solution.
answer_key.related_concept: Graphical method of solution of a pair of linear equations

visual.caption: Two straight lines on the same axes.
visual.altText: Cartesian plane with two distinct straight lines plotted between x equals zero and x equals six. One line has a positive slope and the other has a negative slope.
